name: worknexus
description: WorkNexus（智协中枢）：AI-native 团队协作与工单 WorkOS

scripts.dev:server: cd apps/server && uv run uvicorn worknexus.main:app --reload --port 8200
scripts.contracts:generate: cd apps/server && uv run python -m worknexus.openapi && cd ../.. && npm run generate --workspace=packages/contracts
